title: cymbachne ciliata var. pinguipes
intro: Cymbachne ciliata var. pinguipes, also known as the Pinguipes Grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Cymbachne ciliata var. pinguipes can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
